summary.text: [0-2] A blonde woman in a plaid shirt sits at a wooden table with a green "Baby Bullet" appliance on the left, two small jars with green lids and a clear glass in the center, and patterned mugs with a green tray on the right. She speaks while gesturing near the glass. [2-6] She looks down, touching the clear glass container atop the jars with her right hand, then reaches across the table to the right side near the mugs. [6-14] She picks up a green booklet from the tray area, holding it open with both hands to view the colorful pages inside. She continues to examine the booklet's content, looking down at the pages before looking forward while holding the book against her chest.

[20-22] A woman in a plaid shirt sits at a wooden table, reading an open green booklet held in her right hand, with her left hand resting near patterned mugs. A Baby Bullet appliance, glass container, and small jars sit stationary on the table. [22-28] She lifts a small, patterned cup with her left hand to chest level while continuing to hold the booklet with her right. She looks forward, holding the cup elevated near her face for the remainder of the clip, while the other table items remain undisturbed.

A woman in a plaid shirt sits at a wooden table with a green appliance labeled "baby bullet" and various containers. [28-30] She lowers a small patterned cup from near her face to the table while holding an open green booklet. [30-32] She points her left hand at a small jar with a green lid centrally located on the table. [32-36] She picks up the small jar with the green lid, lifts it to chest height to examine it, and then lowers it back onto the table. [36-38] She reaches her left hand toward the patterned mugs on the right side of the table.

The woman places an open green booklet on the table to her right and lifts a white mug with a reddish pattern in her left hand. She tilts the reddish mug to pour contents into a central clear glass container, then sets it down and repeats the action with a yellowish patterned mug. Finally, she holds a small, light-colored patterned cup near her chin with her left hand, looking slightly left, while a green appliance and jars remain undisturbed on the table's left side.

The woman in the plaid shirt holds an open green booklet with her right hand, looking down at the pages while her left hand gestures near the clear glass container and small jars on the table [18-20]. Later, she lowers a small, light-colored cup from near her face and tilts it over the central clear glass container with a smiley face design, pouring its contents inside [48-54]. After placing the small cup on the table, she picks up a yellowish-green patterned cup with her right hand, lifting it over the central container to pour its contents in as well [54-56]. The green appliance remains on the left and patterned mugs on the right.

[56-60] The woman in the plaid shirt holds a yellowish-green patterned cup over a central clear glass container featuring a smiley face, tilting it fully inverted to pour its contents inside. [60-62] After emptying the cup, she places it on the wooden table to her right, near other mugs. [62-64] She then reaches for a small white patterned cup with her right hand, lifts it, and positions it over the central container while her left hand stays near the base. Throughout, a green appliance labeled "baby bullet" and small jars with green lids remain stationary on the left side of the table.

[68-72] The woman sets a small cup down on the right and picks up a green lid component. She places it onto the central tall clear glass container, using both hands to press and twist it securely. Two small jars with green lids and patterned mugs remain stationary on the wooden table. [72-76] She lifts the sealed jar, inverts it, and places it onto the green motor base labeled "baby bullet" located on the left. She presses down on the top of the inverted jar with both hands to lock it onto the appliance base, focusing on the assembly.

[64-68] A woman in a plaid shirt pours contents from a small white patterned cup into a clear glass container held in her left hand, then extends her right arm to place the cup on the far right of the wooden table. [76-82] She positions the inverted clear jar onto a green motor base labeled "Baby Bullet" on the left side. She presses down firmly on the jar with her right hand while stabilizing the base with her left to blend the mixture. Two small jars with green lids and several patterned mugs remain stationary on the table throughout the sequence.

[82-86] The woman in a plaid shirt presses down on an inverted jar attached to a green motor base labeled 'baby bullet', blending while stabilizing with her left hand. Small jars with green lids and patterned mugs rest on the wooden table. [86-88] She releases pressure, twists the jar to unlock it, holds it upright to inspect, and reaches for a small jar. [88-92] She picks up a small glass jar, unscrews the green lid with her right hand, and separates the lid from the container.
